response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct cloud platform AI system design, vector databases, or RAG architectures — key requirements for this staff-level role. His work is impressive but more generalist and lacks depth in the required GenAI domain.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack skills with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native deployment (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or LLM systems
Missing direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Resume lacks measurable impact on AI system performance, evaluation pipelines, or enterprise cloud AI deployments
